header.title: Masagana Gas Corporation - SOP Portal
header.subtitle: SOP Manual, Operational Guidelines, Approval Matrix & Controls, and Current vs. Future Workflow for Masagana Gas Corporation - covering Operations, Sales, and Accounting across the Commercial, Bulk, Dealer, Semi-dealer, and Company-Wide/Overall channels.

sop_steps: Each department page (Sales, Operations, Accounting) follows a four-part order:
SOP Manual - step-by-step procedure of each work
Operational Guidelines - policy rules and where staff discretion ends
Approval Matrix & Controls - authorized to initiate, review, approve, and control
"Confirmed with source data" badge - the stage is grounded in real
"Partially confirmed" badge - the stage is still a placeholder, with gaps
Cross-linked terms (personnel names, forms, subprocesses) are underlined - click one to jump to its entry in the Personnel, Forms, or Subprocess tab.
guidelines: Financial Controls & Credit Policy: no invoice or plant release proceeds on an account with unresolved past dues unless a supervisor has explicitly approved a passable balance.

Weighing, Residue & Inventory Integrity: gains, losses, and commission are computed only from a matched pair of weigh-in and weigh-out readings; an unmatched reading is held for investigation, never estimated.

Approval & Escalation Discipline: any transaction blocked or disputed at its normal approval level escalates through the standard chain rather than being resolved informally between the two parties involved.
Documentation & Reconciliation: the person who initiates a transaction is not the same person who posts it to the GL or reconciles it - segregation of duties applies at every posting step.

current: Process knowledge for Operations, Sales, and Accounting has lived across separate documents, transcripts, and institutional memory, plus different tools (Google Sheets, ACCPAC, AppSheet, Viber).
future: One SOP portal - GitHub-hosted, JSON-driven, and cross-linked to Personnel/Forms/Subprocess - as the single source of truth for how MGC actually runs, with a clear owner for each transaction.

stages.sources: Merged from Process Systemization Portal (local draft) + source site (wilsonsykes.github.io/MGSDiagramWorkflow).

cross_stage.name: Portal-Wide Governance
cross_stage.description: The four cross-cutting policy themes that apply across every department, detailed further inside each stage's Operational Guidelines section.
guidelines: Financial Controls & Credit Policy - Accounting > Commercial, Dealer, Semi-dealer.
Weighing, Residue & Inventory Integrity - Operations > Commercial, Bulk, Company-Wide.
Approval & Escalation Discipline - Sales > Dealer, Operations > Dealer, Cross-Stage Governance.
Documentation & Reconciliation - Operations > Commercial, Dealer; Accounting > Semi-dealer.

metrics.label: Partially Confirmed
metrics.detail: Gap notes flagged for client confirmation
